creator: maurice@castro.aus.net
text:
The short answer is that as far as I can tell they are actually =
different programs ... certainly very different structurally ... I don't =
believe that they are simply 2 versions of the same program. That said =
the options for pwgen2 appear to overlap with pwgen so pwgen2 is a =
potential drop in replacement.=20

The cost of keeping the code is only finding a hosting location for the =
source file ... the cost of disappearing pwgen is changing any port that =
depends on it. I have not worked out the number of ports that use pwgen.

	Maurice

On 14/03/2012, at 12:17 PM, Ryan Steinmetz wrote:

> It looks like sysutils/pwgen2 already exists for version 2.06.
>=20
> Is there any valid reason to keep the old version around?
